remember: Recall the types of roots, stems and leaves in flowering plants.
Identify the different types of fruits and seeds.
List the main functions of root, stem and leaf.
understand: Explain the structure and function of different types of roots, stems and leaves.
Describe the role of fruits and seeds in the life cycle of flowering plants.
Compare the characteristics of different types of fruits.
apply: Use the knowledge of root, stem and leaf structure to explain how they adapt to the environment.
Use the knowledge of fruit and seed types to explain their dispersal methods.
Explain how the structure of a flower leads to reproduction.
analyze: Compare and contrast the characteristics of different types of flowers.
Analyze the role of different types of roots in a plant's adaptation to the environment.
Explain the importance of root, stem and leaf structure in plant growth and development.

ncert_objectives: To describe the types of roots, stems and leaves in flowering plants.
To explain the structure and function of fruits and seeds in flowering plants.
To describe the different types of fruit and their characteristics.
board_exam_objectives: To identify and describe the different types of roots, stems and leaves in flowering plants.
To explain the structure and function of fruits and seeds in flowering plants.
To describe the dispersal methods of different types of fruits and seeds.
